div.div: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life

College is a lot of fun. You meet hot girls, maybe go all the way. It's even more fun when you live at a friend's house, and his mom is smoking hot. But what will you do if you catch her masturbating? Is there a chance that...? (Source: TOPTOON+)

Kang Tae-han, known as the Heavenly Demon (Cheonma), whose power once reached the skies, returns to his original life after 60 years! “Wow… in such a blessed era, and my body’s in this state?” “Your body’s screaming for help, but are you not hearing it?” The physical and mental recovery project of the old-fashioned, grumpy(?) Heavenly Demon Kang Tae-han begins!! For the exhausted office worker drowned in alcohol and overtime, for the athlete whose body is broken and performance is failing, for the head of the family crushed under the weight of life, for modern people filling themselves with fat just to survive— All you weary souls of modern life, come get a massage! (Source: Naver, translated)
